# Dual Use

> Tracking venture capital investment in dual-use defense tech startups.

Dual Use (dualuse.vc) is a live tracker of the defense tech startup ecosystem — venture capital funds, startups, funding rounds, open jobs, and defense prime partnerships. Data is updated weekly.

## Sections

- [Overview](https://dualuse.vc/): Market stats ($49.1B in 2025 defense tech VC funding), live Signals news feed from Defense One, Breaking Defense, Defense News, C4ISRNET, The War Zone, and SOF Week, open roles preview, and a ranked list of the biggest funding rounds.
- [VC Funds](https://dualuse.vc/#funds): 25 venture capital funds actively investing in defense tech, including Andreessen Horowitz, Founders Fund, In-Q-Tel, Shield Capital, Lux Capital, and Trucks Venture Capital.
- [Startups](https://dualuse.vc/#startups): 100 dual-use defense tech startups with valuations, total raised, key investors, defense prime partners, and dual-use/commercial application summaries.
- [Jobs](https://dualuse.vc/#jobs): Live open roles from 25+ defense tech companies fetched directly from Greenhouse and Ashby job boards. Updated in real time.
- [Funding Rounds](https://dualuse.vc/#funding): Major funding rounds with amounts, lead investors, valuations, and dates.
- [Defense Primes](https://dualuse.vc/#primes): 8 defense prime contractors (Lockheed Martin, RTX, Boeing, Northrop Grumman, L3Harris, General Dynamics, BAE Systems, SAIC) and their startup venture arms and partnerships.
- [About](https://dualuse.vc/#about): About the site, data methodology, and contact information.

## Key facts

- Defense tech VC funding reached $49.1B in 2025, nearly doubling from $27.2B in 2024
- Nearly 8% of all global VC funding now goes to defense tech
- 825 startups now classified as dual-use defense tech
- Sectors covered: Autonomous Systems, AI/ML, Space, Aerospace, Cybersecurity, Maritime, Directed Energy, Advanced Manufacturing, Communications, Energy, Robotics, Biotech

## Notable companies tracked

Anduril Industries ($60B, Series H Mar 2026), Shield AI ($12.7B, Series G Mar 2026), Palantir Technologies (public, NYSE: PLTR), SpaceX ($350B+), Applied Intuition ($15B), Skydio, Joby Aviation (public, NYSE: JOBY), Archer Aviation (public, NYSE: ACHR), Beta Technologies (public, NYSE: BETA), Rocket Lab (public, NASDAQ: RKLB), Scale AI ($29B), Saronic ($4B), Vast ($20B+), Skyryse ($1.15B), JetZero ($1B+), Havoc, True Anomaly, Firestorm, MACH Industries, Auriga Space, and 80 more.

## Recent large funding rounds (2025-2026)

- Anduril Industries: $4B Series H at $60B (Mar 2026)
- Shield AI: $1.5B Series G at $12.7B (Mar 2026)
- Vast: $500M Series A at $20B+ (Mar 2026)
- Sierra Space: $550M Series C at $8B (Mar 2026)
- Chaos Industries: $510M Growth at $4.5B (Nov 2025)
- Saronic: $600M Series C at $4B (Feb 2025)
- Applied Intuition: $600M Series E at $15B (Jun 2025)
- Skyryse: $300M+ Series C at $1.15B (Jan 2026)

## About

Dual Use is an independent tracker. Data is compiled from public filings, news reports, and company announcements. Updated weekly via automated scan. Contact: covington@dualuse.vc
